title: Getting Started with Web Development
excerpt: Web development is an exciting field. Here are some basics to get you started on your journey.

title: Hello World
excerpt: Welcome to my blog! This is where I'll share my thoughts on programming, design, and technology.

title: What is Material Design?
excerpt: Material Design is a design system created by Google. It uses grid-based layouts, responsive animations, and depth effects like lighting and shadows to create a clean, intuitive user interface.

title: Overview of Nazu
excerpt: Nazu 是一門結合了邏輯語（Loglang）與函數式編程語義的人工語言。
